title: It's OK That You're Not OK
author: Megan Devine
subline: A companion for grief, not a fix.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two abstract human figures facing each other. One (right) is leaning forward. The other (left) is the listener/companion. A small red dot between them is the moment of truth. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- LEFT figure: standing, listening -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-200" r="60"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-140" x2="-340" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="80" x2="-380" y2="220"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="80" x2="-300" y2="220"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-80" x2="-400" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-80" x2="-280" y2="-20"/>
    </g>
    <!-- RIGHT figure: leaning forward, in grief, slightly bent -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="340" cy="-160" r="60"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="-100" x2="380" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="380" y1="120" x2="380" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="380" y1="120" x2="420" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="350" y1="-50" x2="260" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="350" y1="-50" x2="270" y2="40"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Small red dot between the two heads — the moment of connection -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-180" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Connecting line between the figures -->
    <line x1="-200" y1="-100" x2="200" y2="-100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4" stroke-dasharray="6 8"/>
    <!-- caption -->
    <text x="0" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">COMPANIONSHIP, NOT CORRECTION</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two stick figures, drawn with hairline strokes. The left stands upright (the companion); the right leans forward with a slight bend (the one in grief). Between them — between their hands — a single red dot. That's the moment: not a fix, just presence. The dashed line between the figures marks the connection. Title 280px mixed case, three lines, ends with a small 'Not OK' that gets the bottom line of the page.
